notes: ALMOST - but not quite. Big blocks of colour blocking most of the screen make it unplayable. The parts of the screen I can see appear to be responding correctly.
title: Eador. Imperium

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Works in general, but has the same graphical issues that Eador. Master of the broken world has under wine. Switching the graphic settings after every start/loading to low and than to ultra fixes most graphical issues, but on some maps fog of war or something similar blocks part of the map. Aside from the graphical glitches, game works fine. Played about 100h in wine and proton combined.
title: Eador. Imperium
